scope: Current HSK content, loaders, persistence, provenance and migration risks. No production curriculum content created.

currentArchitecture.baseShape: Global HSKCurriculum object with array-based words/grammar/dialogue and DOM renderer in the same file.

effectiveOverrides.mechanism: Fetch .txt fragments, concatenate, execute with Function(code), then replace HSKCurriculum.levels[1].

currentArchitecture.dictionary: assets/v79/hsk-dictionary-v79.js lazy-loads 15 JSON chunks but is separate from lesson curriculum.

placeholders.evidence: levelDescriptions = Sắp mở and levels assigned empty arrays.

hardCodedLogic: Lesson data and UI renderer share hsk-lessons.js.
HSK1 V75 patches static DOM copy and overrides the global curriculum after initial render.
V75 executes fetched text through Function(code), creating CSP, debugging and integrity risk.
Quiz distractors are deterministic cursor arithmetic over a level pool and lack cognitive/diversity metadata.
State only accepts selectedLevel <= 4, so levels 5–9 cannot be selected by current persistence logic.
Browser speechSynthesis is the only general listening fallback and has no owned audio provenance/manifest.
IDs, prerequisites, source references, skill coverage and final-assessment references are not validated.

migrationRisks.risk: Do not remove or rename erp-hsk-state-v2 / erp-hsk-progress-v2 without a compatibility adapter; users can lose completion state.
V75 HSK1 is loaded asynchronously from community.js and overrides base HSK1. A new loader can race or double-render unless V75 is explicitly retired in Phase 1.
HSK1 150-word claim reflects legacy HSK 2.0 assumptions and must be tagged legacy rather than silently treated as GF0025-2021 Level 1.
The v79 dictionary has 10978 records versus the official standard total 11092 and uses derived/AI-assisted sources; do not use it as an authoritative curriculum map.
HSK 7–9 vocabulary is officially one combined band. Artificially splitting it into official Level 7, 8 and 9 lists would be false provenance.
Roast Mode and learning-event hooks depend on current DOM selectors; migration needs a compatibility event adapter.

manualReviewRequired: Linguist review of every Vietnamese gloss and grammar explanation.
Legal/license review before redistributing derived vocabulary or dictionary datasets.
Official syllabus field-by-field extraction and checksum verification in Phase 1.
UX/mobile verification after lazy loader integration.

skillProfile.translation: sight and written translation with basic commentary

skillProfile.speaking: formal presentation, interpreting and expert discussion
skillProfile.translation: oral/written translation, editing and justification of choices

confirmedFacts: HSK1 V75 contains 150 word records and its existing test confirms 150 unique Hanzi strings within that level.
Vocabulary such as 学习 appears at multiple levels without firstIntroducedIn/reviewStage/reviewReason metadata, so intentional review cannot be distinguished from accidental duplication.
blockedBy: Current content is split between hsk-lessons.js and executable .txt fragments.
Exercises do not have stable exercise IDs, stems, option metadata or templateFamily fields.
duplicateBaseline.nextAction: Phase 1 must normalize legacy content into an audit-only intermediate representation and run exact, normalized, n-gram and stem-variation checks before migration.

qualityGate.decision: Do not migrate or generate HSK1–9 production content until Phase 1 architecture and validators pass.

dictionary.sourceRisk: Uses third-party derived HSK list and AI-assisted Vietnamese dictionary; not acceptable as sole authority.
